analysis: The main hero image shows a serious, concerned-looking professional in a business suit surrounded by anxious others in an employment setting. Headlines: 'US economy unexpectedly loses 92,000 jobs' (major negative vs. expectations of 55,000 additions), Trump/Iran war tensions, Oracle layoffs. Facial expressions convey stress and economic distress. All major indices down significantly (S&P -1.07%, Dow -1.21%, Nasdaq -0.88%). Overall sentiment: deeply negative - job losses, geopolitical tension, corporate cuts.
